description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a robust, modern design. The headband is thick and smoothly contoured, connecting two large, cushioned ear cups that appear to provide significant noise isolation. The ear cups are circular with a visible mesh or grille on the outer side, likely for acoustic transparency or aesthetic effect. The headphones are predominantly black with some metallic or silver accents around the ear cup grilles, giving them a sleek, professional appearance. The padding on the ear cups looks soft and deep, suggesting comfort for extended use. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A pair of large, black over-ear headphones with cushioned ear cups and metallic mesh accents, designed for comfort and durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick headband and deep, oval-shaped ear cushions.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the metallic mesh grille and the curvature of the headband.
description_view_2: Direct rear view displaying both ear cups and the symmetrical design of the headphones.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the mesh grille and the robust ear cup structure.
